name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: IRS Update from True the Vote
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this email, view it online.

Hi Supporter -

Our lawsuit against the IRS is making
headlines - and we're making headway! Last week, U.S. District
Court Judge Reggie Walton ordered the IRS to start releasing
names and documents. In fact, he outright asked IRS attorneys
why they continue to "hide the ball."

We put together a quick video to bring you up
to speed….

The bottom line is that our battle against
the IRS is still in full swing. It's been a long four years, but
we cannot quit.

What the IRS did, to me, to True the Vote,
and to thousands of other organizations and individuals, is
unconstitutional, unconscionable, and unacceptable.

Make no mistake; the IRS can and will
continue in their targeting schemes unless and until they are
forced to stop. We must see this effort through to conclusion.
But we need your help.

This fight against the IRS is about far more
than what they did to True the Vote. A win in this case will
produce future protections that we will all benefit from.

Sometimes fundraising requests make their
causes seem too surreal to really connect with. This is a very,
very real fight. And we will keep fighting…with your
help. Please help support our legal battle to end IRS targeting.

Working together we can win this….and,
together we can and will true the vote.

Onward,

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

Office

713.401.3550

Mail

P.O. Box
131768
Houston,
TX 77219-1768

Email

info@truethevote.org

Web

www.truethevote.org

True the Vote is a 501(c)(3)
nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095.
Donations are tax-deductible to
the extent allowed by law.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 24, 2017.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.pdmcampaign.com/p/iWorkVWENS

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.pdmcampaign.com/p/oWorkVWENS

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-46283670829-echo3-687F19B3A29FCB38BE8C1DCA6A3EC80B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: The White House
subject: Ongoing Federal Support for Hurricane Harvey
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e13f231462af149f4c4d0cd7cb3195486f3f1384e9dfbb9a1727503595b9b3de2f062ae8fd4a2e672e4c09b96a56252367

-------------

Ongoing Federal Support for Hurricane Harvey

On Sunday, President Trump and Vice President Pence led meetings with the Cabinet and senior members of the Administration to discuss ongoing Federal support for Hurricane Harvey response and recovery. The President continued to stress his expectation that all departments and agencies stay fully committed to supporting the Governors of Texas and Louisiana and his number one priority of saving lives. He reminded everyone that search and rescue efforts will transition to mass care, restoring power, providing life-sustaining necessities for the population that sheltered in place, and economic recovery.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e10c9ef10d1caaab3a7fa8cedf2b239666faa9c77da135605bfc7fe2f299498a54dfb4b12128e218cb1a2388d6f589eb4c
Read more

President Trump Approves Texas Disaster Declaration

On Friday, President Trump declared that a major disaster exists in the State of Texas and ordered Federal aid to supplement State and local recovery efforts in the areas affected by Hurricane Harvey beginning on August 23, 2017, and continuing.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e1a6cc97a3e7588d6cec74be47d014944179f4f30fe4b1d28cba3e9cea7fd29be7ec7a8cec4e8d7a8f9ee3ca3178f0328c
Read more

President Trump Approves Louisiana Emergency Declaration

Today, President Trump declared that an emergency exists in the State of Louisiana and ordered Federal assistance to supplement State, tribal, and local response efforts due to the emergency conditions resulting from Tropical Storm Harvey beginning on August 27, 2017, and continuing.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e16a3a10ecf36da1d5d23cc9f0fe245f16a7ccb44f02201614443824b9fbc43fc20779758b6d6c7454875ff831b1d0082c
Read more

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump leads a video teleconference monitoring the current tropical storm conditions in southeastern Texas | August 27, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS and VP Today

Today, President Trump welcomes President Sauli Niinistö of Finland to the White House for a bilateral meeting and press conference.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e1065c17a895b1f80fd25b8ed981cd9b7b9b33eeeeb781477fe0b3e5c072bd7289057181bbfdbbb2e87dbb05b99eabb843
Watch the Press Conference LIVE at 2pm EST.
Vice President Pence will join President Trump and Secretary of State Rex Tillerson for lunch and will meet with U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley later in the afternoon.

White House Spring Internship

The application for the Spring 2018 White House Internship Program is open!
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e10de8b96510019da46779487d54e6ca1f766ed1ba820e665b6f51781b9c03ede8243242c8d7d0b70faab0df515a3e93dc
Apply here

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e167191d98347083bd86143a3e5cddc84d91a82b71b764f55e5866e4baf18705cd3c61375499c17e372dc387a1f6956fd1
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5518f266e2c420e14a62b028ccdc51e043441955a9f245ceb7a48bf1ecc7ccbf027b001b2f90645fc693498728363e9d687d6df74992b5b5
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4173a22dd70a68cb82d4798e7d17448be6aaa50dff9f0b2594548814d8aeb914e44577ebe38f9f3f66de5ff80d2704c6c
Unsubscribe

name: John Kasich
subject: Let's try something different
body:
It's the end of the month, which means you're about to get a
flood of political fundraising emails.

Peter, it's the end of the
month, which means you're about to get a flood of political
fundraising emails.

And while ours has financial
needs just like every other political organization, I'd like to
propose that we try something different this month:

The brave citizens of Texas and
other southern regions of America are facing a real crisis right
now with Hurricane Harvey. Let's put aside the politics for a
while and do what we can to help them out.

Here's how you can chip in right
now:

Donate to the American Red Cross
(here)

-or-
Phone: Call 1-800-REDCROSS or
Text: HARVEY to 90999 to make a $10 donation
-or-
Donate to the Salvation Army
(here)

I was a guest on NBC's Meet the
Press Sunday and spoke about the need for all Americans to pull
together to help each other out - especially in times of crisis
like a natural disaster.

Please take a moment to watch and
share this clip to help us get this message out:

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-John

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isBztDWENS

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osBztDWENS

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-46289270364-echo3-91DC5F54AC584FC74BD982FCB7A41EBB@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: The 10 Democratic women senators who need your support
body:
| | |
---|---|---
Dear Activist, Ten of our amazing female Democratic Senators are up for re-election in 2018, and each one of them needs our help to launch strong campaigns. [**Nearly HALF the women of the Senate face re-election next year. Add your name right now to say you 're in to help them launch strong, tough campaigns**](http://mail.democrats.com:81/CT00149901MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2017-08-28). The list of Democratic women up for re-election includes: ● Elizabeth Warren, who won't stop fearlessly calling out the Trump administration, no matter how hard Mitch McConnell tries to silence her, ● Mazie Hirono, who bravely returned from treatment for Stage 4 kidney cancer to cast her vote to save health care coverage for millions of Americans, and ● Kirsten Gillibrand, who has boldly stood up to Trump's Cabinet nominees and resisted his disastrous policies. We know that our Democratic women will face uniquely vicious attacks, and shady right-wing super PACs are already running harsh ads against them. We need to help them launch strong campaigns now that can withstand the tough fights ahead. All ten of the female Democratic Senators up for re-election are leading the charge to resist Trump's reckless agenda and it's essential we make sure every single one of them returns to the Senate next year. [**Add your name now to the 2018 Women 's Senate Network to keep all of our Democratic women in the Senate fighting for us**](http://mail.democrats.com:81/CT00149902MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2017-08-28). Thanks, Team DSCC
Paid for by DSCC
* * *
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million
supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace.
We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations.
Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L42) if you do not want future messages from DSCC.
If you do not want messages from any of our partners [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: ISOLATED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Are they really this FOOLISH? |
---
| | |

Peter,

The fake news keeps saying, "President Trump is isolated."

...They say I'm isolated by lobbyists, corporations, grandstanding politicians, and Hollywood.

GOOD! _I don 't want them._ All I ever want is the support and love from the AMERICAN PEOPLE who've been betrayed by a weak and self-serving political class.

We're coming up on our FEC-mandated end-of-month deadline and the media will be waiting to see if the American people have walked away from our movement. With your help, our numbers will show the world that the people are still fighting to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e6b6a8c3ca4b168b57f1d8df2722a5eedf5cec15841c3aab95526400b1ef94fe404cebec171f65e0ef) Look -- Hollywood and the media are going to hate us no matter what we say or do.

_**Their goal is to take us down. My goal is to bring all Americans up!**_

The economy is booming, we are going to build the wall, illegal immigration is down BIG LEAGUE, justice is being delivered, sanctuary cities are losing support, and American energy is on the rise.

...And that's even with self-serving politicians obstructing our agenda.

I didn't run for president to be a puppet for the political class. I ran to be a champion for the people.

**The only support I will ever care about is from American patriots like you.**

**[Please help us CRUSH our August goal and make this our best month ever with a contribution of $1.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e671e140030230bd6aafdd5f021d4907b518d042e2a096c56c2234add91fd2b725c3ee5b0f290e124c)**

Thank you and MAGA,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e60acbb742faeeebd3c4397e2ee9b2a149af4e8d5d670bf5aea5212e984540ed86b1c87ff3879bc617)
Donald J. Trump
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e6faf6453742ae50184fb03d8b28f149ec4af4e7e3b4b6a06e1b06ef14289c843a81c1677286b89190)

---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e65a535bab40fe23ad8bcfc68751c8216830e85aaa0c5fca8ede492e451822efd39bed072011044951) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ff18c1a120d0b4e65c54b352a52591aee7b21eacc335d5e3c4adf91d6e9c320f5d1e785aaf05a65149bbd1580ee99a76) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abfdfbb158666c741502b564c92c4ac06727844ae0ef35735fcdafeadc16b46116db01521f0c84bde2) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846e9ed9213a7d3b8262d890676dbf5abde94f22ac51824dc81)

name: DWS
subject: we are fighters
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Don't worry, I'll keep this quick today. First, as you know, there are already four opponents running against me. And, not surprisingly, we recently had the Republican National Committee and the President take aim at us. But none of that bothers me. Do you want to know why? **Because none of that stops me from fighting for Florida families like I always have.** I've introduced legislation to make it easier for veterans to access medical care, prevent oil spills, and to provide more resources to survivors of domestic violence. **I 'm working hard to protect our families and our environment, especially in these politically anxious times. The key to victory is preparation.** That's why even a contribution of $5 can help grow our grassroots team and keep us one step ahead of our four opponents. [_**Can I count on you to give $5 before the end of the day?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2d/622b7b5b/56a106c/307bda93/3158758475/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170828?refcode=dwse1707828_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2d/622b7b5b/56a106c/307bda93/3158758475/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170828?refcode=dwse1707828_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you,
Debbie

[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2d/622b7b5b/56a106c/307bda92/3158758475/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: 1963 and 2018
body:
#
Team --
Today marks 54 years since Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. shared his dream with us at the March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom.
And if the events of the past three weeks prove anything, we are still on that march.
But just as Dr. King said as he marched from Selma to Montgomery, "...we are not about to turn around. We are on the move now. Yes, we are on the move and no wave of racism can stop us."
Together, you and I are going to keep fighting for freedom and equality. We're going to work to create not just any jobs, but jobs with dignity -- work that pays a living wage, where you don't have to work three jobs just to make ends meet. We're going to invest in public education and job training programs, like SHOP 2.0, so that more Floridians have the opportunity to break out of the vicious cycle of intergenerational poverty. We're going to heal this state and make freedom a part of everybody's story, no matter what they look like or where they come from.
We have come a long way in these past 54 years, and we still have a long way to go. It's never been easy and it never will be easy, but I promise you it will always be worth it. As long as we keep marching together, we're going to fulfill that dream some day, and I firmly believe it will be some day soon.
As fate would have it, our primary election day is exactly one year from today, on the 55th anniversary of the March on Washington. [**If you 'd like to join our campaign in making history by electing the first black Governor of Florida, please contribute whatever you can afford today.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32bf/9e00690/4ccfaea9/240369df/3805917746/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170828-march")
Thank you for marching together with us.
Bring it home,
Andrew

**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32bf/9e00690/4ccfaea9/240369df/3805917746/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-august2017?refcode=em20170828-march")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32bf/9e00690/4ccfaea9/240369de/3805917746/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32bf/9e00690/4ccfaea9/240369d0/3805917746/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
clean_body: Team -- Today marks 54 years since Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. shared his dream with us at the March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom. And if the events of the past three weeks prove anything, we are still on that march. But just as Dr. King said as he marched from Selma to Montgomery, "...we are not about to turn around. We are on the move now. Yes, we are on the move and no wave of racism can stop us." Together, you and I are going to keep fighting for freedom and equality. We're going to work to create not just any jobs, but jobs with dignity -- work that pays a living wage, where you don't have to work three jobs just to make ends meet. We're going to invest in public education and job training programs, like SHOP 2.0, so that more Floridians have the opportunity to break out of the vicious cycle of intergenerational poverty. We're going to heal this state and make freedom a part of everybody's story, no matter what they look like or where they come from. We have come a long way in these past 54 years, and we still have a long way to go. It's never been easy and it never will be easy, but I promise you it will always be worth it. As long as we keep marching together, we're going to fulfill that dream some day, and I firmly believe it will be some day soon. As fate would have it, our primary election day is exactly one year from today, on the 55th anniversary of the March on Washington. "" Thank you for marching together with us. Bring it home, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: New Hampshire Republican Party
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Joyce Craig campaigning and fundraising with Los Angeles Mayor Eric Garcetti
body:
**PRESS RELEASE**

**For Immediate Release:** August 28, 2017
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310

**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Joyce Craig campaigning and fundraising with Los Angeles Mayor Eric Garcetti**

Concord – Los Angeles Mayor Eric Garcetti is visiting Derry today to campaign for Joyce Craig, candidate for Mayor of Manchester. NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the Garcetti visit for Joyce Craig:

“Campaigning with Mayor Garcetti shows just how out-of-touch Joyce Craig is with the needs of Manchester families. Mayor Garcetti uses taxpayer funds to shield illegal immigrants from the law. Los Angeles is living through a rise in violent crime and murder under his watch. No wonder Joyce Craig is holding her fundraiser with Mayor Garcetti in Derry instead of Manchester, where constituents would demand to know if Craig supports Garcetti's dangerous policies. Manchester deserves a leader that will put Manchester first, not one who uses their campaign to court out-of-state interests. Mayor Gatsas is working to decrease drug addiction and crime, and the Garcetti pro-sanctuary city agenda takes Manchester in the exact wrong direction.”

###
**BACKGROUND:**

**WMUR first: LA Mayor Garcetti headed to NH to campaign for Joyce Craig in Manchester**
http://www.wmur.com/article/wmur-first-la-mayor-garcetti-headed-to-nh-to-campaign-for-joyce-craig-in-manchester/12016249
**A $10-million fund will help immigrants fight deportations. But should it help those with violent criminal convictions?**
http://www.latimes.com/local/lanow/la-me-ln-la-justice-fund-20170417-story.html
**Violent crime in L.A. jumps for third straight year as police deal with gang, homeless issues**
http://www.latimes.com/local/lanow/la-me-crime-stats-20161227-story.html
**Manchester Sees Drop in Violent Crimes**
https://www.usnews.com/news/best-states/new-hampshire/articles/2017-07-10/manchester-sees-drop-in-violent-crimes

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Must Read: "What's so great about the Hoosier state? It's not Illinois."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/indiana/indianaisgreat?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1cc65db952&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | _"What's so great about the Hoosier state? It's not Illinois."_

Look, we've said it before, but now [so has the _Chicago Tribune_](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=605d467120&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

In an [editorial posted over the weekend](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=45e398b3ea&e=1acd9bb3d6), the _Tribune's_ editorial board wrote about the spectacular work _**Governor Eric Holcomb**_ is doing to lure jobs across the border to Indiana. Here's how they put it: "Alas, _**it’s no longer surprising when an Illinois company leaves for Indiana**_. HMD is building a $6 million headquarters and depot in Gary, with plans to create 500 jobs by 2021. Alliance Steel of Bedford Park wants to build a $35 million plant in Gary. Hoist Liftruck and T&B Tube have jumped the state line. More will follow, taking jobs and investment with them. _**Why? Because Indiana is one of the best states in the nation for doing business, and Illinois is one of the worst.**_ "

And then there's this:

"Despite the similarities, the two states have very different economic prospects. Indiana is in fine fettle, while Illinois is a basket case, with more than a $130 billion in unfunded pension liabilities, an unbalanced budget and $15 billion in overdue bills. Illinois has higher taxes, too, which would need to be raised even higher to right the ship. We have no idea what that would cost taxpayers, given that the Democrat-controlled General Assembly, ruled by House Speaker Mike Madigan and Senate President John Cullerton, has resisted Republican Gov. Bruce Rauner on his turnaround plan. This constitutes a major roadblock to future job growth and prosperity."

You read that right - Republican leadership can get Illinois back on track just as it got Indiana back on track.

That's no surprise either.

Read the full editorial [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a2dea1cf9&e=1acd9bb3d6) and be sure to share our [Facebook post](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=12829e7747&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Twitter post](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ee990add48&e=1acd9bb3d6).

name: Rob Portman
subject: Hurricane Harvey
body:
| Peter -- I am sure you have watched with great concern as Hurricane Harvey has caused so much damage and devastation to our fellow citizens down in Texas. And it looks like it is not over yet. More rain is coming. I have talked to people around Ohio who want to help -- it is what we do at times like these. There are many worthy organizations; Jane and I chose to make our contribution through the American Red Cross. You can do the same by [clicking here and giving what you can](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.redcross.org%2Fdonate%2Fhurricane-harvey&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hurricaneharvey&n=1) to help the American Red Cross in its important work. Our country shows just how special and generous our people are at times like these. I'm proud of groups like Ohio's Task Force 1 Search and Rescue Team that are assisting with the rescue and recovery efforts in Texas. Every little bit helps, so [thanks for considering making a contribution](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.redcross.org%2Fdonate%2Fhurricane-harvey&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hurricaneharvey&n=2). And in the meantime, let's pray for our fellow citizens in Texas. All best,

Rob Portman [

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hurricaneharvey&n=3)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hurricaneharvey&n=4). -=-=-
